description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted with a neutral facial expression and a natural, relaxed stance. He is dressed in a short-sleeved crew-neck t-shirt with a small printed text on the left chest and back, paired with slim-fit pants that reach the ankles. The figure wears low-top sneakers and has short, neatly styled hair. The arms are slightly bent at the elbows and held away from the body, with fingers extended naturally. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes are rendered with visible soles and laces.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a casual t-shirt, slim-fit pants, and sneakers, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has short hair and a neutral, relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest text on the t-shirt, and the full front of the outfit with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's relaxed position, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the printed text on the upper back of the t-shirt, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and side of the outfit from the opposite angle.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and slim-fit pants
